title: macrotyloma ellipticum
intro: Macrotyloma ellipticum, also known as Horse Gram, is a legume plant that belongs to the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herb for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Horse Gram include reducing blood sugar levels, lowering cholesterol, and improving cardiovascular health, as well as aiding in weight management and digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, soups, or powders, and is often used as a supplement or added to traditional medicines in various parts of the world.
